title: Kavanah: The Art of Praying with Intention
title_zh: Kavanah（卡瓦纳）：带着意念祈祷的艺术
description: How to move beyond rote recitation into genuine connection with God — practical techniques from Chassidic and Mussar traditions.
description_zh: 如何超越机械背诵进入与上帝的真实连接——来自哈西德派和穆萨尔派传统的实用技巧。
description_he: איך לעבור מעבר לדקלום שגרתי לחיבור אמיתי עם הקב״ה - טכניקות מעשיות ממסורות החסידות והמוסר.
author: Torah Light Content Team
key_concepts: Baal Shem Tov's approach to distracting thoughts
Rambam on awareness of meaning and presence
cultural_parallels: Daoist wu wei (无为) - effortless action
Gradual spiritual growth similar to Chinese philosophical traditions

historical_periods.chinese_equivalent: Han Dynasty (汉朝, 206 BCE - 220 CE) to Jin Dynasty

target_audience: Beginners to Jewish prayer seeking to deepen their spiritual practice and understanding of intention in prayer
